title: Introducing the new Video Agent | HeyGen | 135 comments
text:
Introducing the new Video Agent
HeyGen
78,478 followers
3mo
Edited
Report this post
Meet Dave.
Dave is terrible at producing videos.

He's tried the tools. 
He's watched the tutorials. 
He's rage-quit more timelines than he can count.

Our new Video Agent fixes that.

→ See the full blueprint before anything renders
→ Direct changes through conversation
→ Edit every element after

Dave always had the message. Now he owns the production.

Video Agent from HeyGen: for the Daves of the world.
